name: kittooltip
description: Project containing your PowerApps Component Framework (PCF) control.

comments.tabster: No tabster pin here on purpose. This control renders on a Fluent Tooltip (positioning only, no focus trap), so it never augments the host's shared tabster instance and cannot hit the version-skew collision a Popover does. Verified on a live form with a deliberately newer tabster (8.8.0) bundled against the host's 8.2.0: the control still rendered. The focus-managed PCFs (date picker, option set, lookup, grid) keep their pin because they do engage tabster.
